name: A small bakery
description:
You stand inside a small bakery.  Bread is baked here in a quaint little brick
furnace.  There is a counter where hungry paying customers line up to buy
bread.  The aroma from the furnace is tantalizingly pleasant.  There is a sign
on the counter.  It is surprising that this bakery did not suffer the same fate
as the other vendors during the food riots.  A menu on the wall lists the types
of bread for sale.
